top_signals.title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed’s Kashkari tells CNBC that inflation fight takes priority as labor market is 'in decent shape'
top_signals.summary: The Minneapolis Fed President warned that persistently high inflation risks becoming embedded in consumer expectations, potentially forcing tougher policy action later.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls below $73,000 as BlackRock’s BTC ETF sees largest outflows since debut
top_signals.summary: Spot bitcoin ETFs saw their largest outflows on Wednesday since late January, with IBIT posting its biggest daily net outflow on record.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
